title: 最近流行りの『尻尾占い』

text_block_list.name: Sweep & Biko
text_block_list.text: Tail-reading fortune?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yup! It's so popular right now. You can find love
by reading your tail. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
How does it work? Does it... tell you who likes
you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's wayyy better than that. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It tells you who your soulmate is!

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It can t-tell you something like that?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, the love fortune knows all! Looking at
your tail...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You'll find someone kind and family-oriented! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Kind and family-oriented... I see...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sweep, your partner will be someone who's a little
showy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sh-showy?! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uh, wait. I wanna know more about how this
works! Let me do it too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha, okay! ☆ Well, you gotta look at this chart
first...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Biko, I will now announce your destined
partner-to-be.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Uh, I'm good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You're not the littlest bit curious?
We're talking about the love of your life.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I dunno... I'm just not sure!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Please, it'll only take a second! I promise to get it
right!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I said I'm good!
